reviews.review_title: art puzzle app in disguise, Fix that 1st
reviews.review_description:
REVIEW POSTED 9.7.25. 

I thought this looked familiar. 9 months ago I gave a positive review for a pretty similar title called Art Puzzle. It’s so similar in fact that it even has a few of the same puzzles included. What’s really annoying is it is supposed to have 50 puzzles and I can only access 31. Well, I think i can I haven’t tried every single one to check. Looking at other reviews, some buyers seem to have even less. I am able to click a download link for a lot of them, but nothing happens. It feels like it has been abandoned, with not a word from the developers. This is disgraceful, if that’s the case. You shouldn’t be allowed to leave one game for dead and start a new almldt identical one. 

This title was cheaper in the sale, but it hardly has any puzzles. 

I am reaching out to the developers, if i get a decent response to this review and access to my other puzzles I am happy to up the review scores. If not this will be refunded and I will leave a 1 star reviews for both. I also want answers as I am sure other customers do too. Why was the other game art puzzle seeemingly abandoned? Why can we not access the other puzzles? Why create such a similar game in early access with hardly any puzzles at all? Will more be added later and when? 

They are so similar, it does just seem like a money grabbing exercise from the developer art2team. I would be extremely happy to be proved wrong. If you can at least respond as requested  by 12 July then I am happy to change my rating and keep this app. Otherwise I will refund it and I won’t be able to edit the review. 

Credit, where it’s the due, when I reviewed the other title 9 months ago, the developers did provide an update to fix an issue with the back then. Absolutely nothing since though. 

As for the game itself, if it had more puzzles it would be worth the four stars I gave their other title, art puzzle. As is it’s not bad but way too similar to the other one. If you like puzzle games I’d probably suggest looking elsewhere. Puzzling places is by far the best, but there are other quality titles on the Quest store too. 

DEVELOPERS THE CLOCK IS TICKING. YOU HAVE UNTIL 12.7.25. IF YOU WANT MY  REVIEW CHANGED AND ME NOT TO REFUND ARTFUL PUZZLE. THE BALL IS IN YOUR COURT!
